mapper.select: SELECT faq_id, question, answer, 1 - (embedding <=> #{embeddingVector}::vector) AS score FROM faq_doc WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embeddingVector}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE faq_doc SET embedding = #{embeddingVector}::vector WHERE faq_id = #{faqId}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT faq_id, question, answer, created_at FROM faq_doc WHERE embedding IS NULL
SELECT faq_id, question, answer, created_at FROM faq_doc ORDER BY created_at
